title: aria calvescens
intro: Aria calvescens is a type of plant that belongs to the family Asteraceae and is commonly known as the 'Tall Bur Marigold'. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties that help to reduce swelling and combat infections. The health benefits of Aria calvescens include its ability to treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne, as well as its use in reducing fever and relieving respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Aria calvescens can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to treat various health issues and promote overall well-being.
